title: Uber spikes on busy weeks
description: You spend 2.3x more on ride-share during weeks with 4+ work meetings.

title: Lunch out = higher daily spend
description: Days with a "lunch" calendar event average $18 more in food spend.

title: Weekend cooking saves $40
description: When you cook at home 2+ weekend nights, you save ~$40 vs. eating out.

title: Social events drive spending
description: Dinner and "birthday" events are your top predicted spend triggers this week.

title: Coffee runs add up
description: You average 4 café visits per week; cutting to 2 could save ~$24/month.

title: Quiet weeks = under budget
description: Weeks with fewer than 3 social events usually end 15% under budget.

title: Subscription creep
description: You have 5 recurring subscriptions; 2 haven't been used in 30+ days.

title: Best day to save
description: Tuesdays and Wednesdays are your lowest-spend days—good for no-spend goals.
